message:
docs(upgrade-log): correct last-commit SHA in summary footer

Cosmetic follow-up: records b8f3d08 (the cargo-update commit that landed this
file) as the session's final library-updater commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -43,7 +43,7 @@ External dependencies (non-path) declared in `crates/*/Cargo.toml`:

-Last library-updater commit:  `db7f076` (workspace lock refresh)
+Last library-updater commit:  `b8f3d08` (workspace lock refresh)
